ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Cameras provide a number of interesting effects in RenderMan for Maya.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Cameras 在 RenderMan for Maya 中提供多种有趣的 effects。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: (we support the Maya native projection workflow)
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: （我们支持 Maya native projection workflow）
Pixel and Sample Filtering（像素与采样过滤）

ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 关于 camera projection plugin（tilt-shift 和 vignetting 等高级 features 需要该插件），你可以在

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: RenderMan currently implements image planes as a
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: RenderMan 目前将 image planes 实现为

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: generates an undistorted texture (.tex) from the non-square input image (.png example) so that the sample filter can project it properly. The txmake command looks something like this:
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 从非方形 input image（.png 示例）生成未失真的 texture（.tex），以便 sample filter 能正确投射它。txmake command 大致如下：

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: This behavior creates an incompatibility of image plane textures generated by older versions of RenderMan. If you're having distortion problems, it's likely because you're using the same image plane textures (.tex) between different versions of RenderMan. It could also be because you've manually generated the image plane textures (.tex) using the wrong txmake arguments (note "up-" vs "up").
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 此行为会导致旧版 RenderMan 生成的 image plane textures 不兼容。如果遇到 distortion 问题，很可能是因为你在不同 RenderMan 版本之间使用了相同的 image plane textures（.tex）。也可能是因为你使用错误的 txmake arguments 手动生成了 image plane textures（.tex）（注意 "up-" 与 "up" 的区别）。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Legacy behavior can be achieved by disabling the
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Legacy behavior 可以通过禁用
option 来获得 legacy behavior；该选项位于 Advanced render settings 下。
为了使用 pattern plug-in 作为 image plane color，必须禁用
